description_long: This is a compact, modern axe with a striking, multicolored finish blending purples, blues, and blacks across both the handle and blade. The handle is ergonomically curved with a textured, grippy surface and several visible fasteners, suggesting a robust, full-tang construction. The blade features a unique, angular design with a broad cutting edge and a pronounced beard, as well as a secondary pointed edge opposite the main blade, likely for prying or breaching. The axe's surface has a matte, slightly rough finish, and the coloration appears to be a custom or decorative coating rather than natural metal. The overall build suggests it is designed for tactical or utility use in urban environments, such as emergency response or breaching. No visible brand or manufacturer markings are present on the object.
description: A compact, modern axe with a curved, textured handle and a multicolored, matte-finished blade featuring both a broad edge and a pointed prying tip.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from the side, highlighting the curved handle, textured grip, and the full profile of the angular, multicolored blade.
description_view_1: A narrow, edge-on view showing the thickness of the handle and blade, with the prying tip and grip texture visible along the spine.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the full length of the handle and blade, emphasizing the ergonomic curve and the attachment points along the handle.
description_view_3: A top-down view displaying the width of the handle and blade, as well as the textured grip and the alignment of the blade edges.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, ergonomic handle with a textured, grippy polymer surface and visible fasteners; oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Angular, broad blade with a pronounced beard and a secondary pointed prying edge; matte, multicolored finish.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern full-tang construction with visible fasteners securing the handle scales to the tang.
